_doc: Runner configuration — all settings for local_runner.py. No env vars needed.

api._doc: API connection. The runner polls this for tasks and reports results.

execution._doc: How tasks are executed. parallel=max concurrent tasks. timeout=default seconds per task.
execution._work_dir_doc: Override working directory for task execution. null = repo root.

providers._doc: Provider-specific config. paused=list of providers to never select.

heartbeat._doc: External heartbeat hooks. Both fire on every heartbeat cycle (5-10s). Neither blocks tasks.
heartbeat._url_doc: POST JSON {node_id, task_id, provider, elapsed_s, files_changed, git_summary} to this URL.
heartbeat._cmd_doc: Shell command with CC_TASK_ID, CC_PROVIDER, CC_ELAPSED etc. in env. 10s timeout.

diagnostics._doc: Observability level. normal=10s heartbeat, file list. high=5s, diff stats, process info.

deploy._doc: Production verification URLs. Used by deploy and verify phases.

self_update._doc: Auto-pull origin/main when idle. Disable with enabled=false for pinned-version runners.
